basic_details.job_title: SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: State Selection Board Odisha has officially released the Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 03/2026) for 14 vacancies across Odisha. Eligible graduates in any discipline with adequate computer knowledge aged between 21 to 42 years can apply online from 01 July 2026 to 18 August 2026 via the official SSB Odisha recruitment portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a regular basis under Level-4 of the ORSP Pay Matrix, 2017, with a monthly salary as per government norms.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC, ST, SEBC, Women and Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution/Board, Adequate knowledge in basic Computer skill with certification
qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institution/Board. Adequate knowledge in basic Computer skill with certification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4, Cell-1 of the Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017
salary_details.details: Level-4, Cell-1 of the Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017

selection_process: Written Test Computer Skill Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SSB Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SSB Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SSB Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SSB Odisha Junior Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the SSB Odisha Junior Assistant recruitment is 18 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Junior Assistant post is 21 years. Applicants must meet this age criterion as of 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Assistant post is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognized university and have adequate knowledge in basic computer skills with certification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies available for the Junior Assistant post in the State Selection Board Odisha.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is 500. This fee is to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC/ST category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST category candidates is 200. This fee is to be paid online as part of the application submission.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Junior Assistant post is offered a salary at Level-4, Cell-1 of the Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for the Junior Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Assistant post includes a Written Test, a Computer Skill Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for SSB Odisha Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link, or directly from the official website of SSB Odisha.
